scopeDescription: Supply of installation services for an in-ground spa install at 14 Waratah St, Baulkham Hills NSW 2153. The spa is 2.3m long x 2.3m wide x 0.95m deep. Position: Spa is going in the back left corner, one point eight metres off the rear boundary and one point two off the left side fence, so the equipment hatch faces the house. Karen wants the spa sitting flush with a deck they are building later, and they asked us to keep the concrete as small as we can. A crane will be used to place the spa. Crane hire is included in this quote. Site access is via a 1.05m wide path. Ground conditions: clay, slight fall. Work covered: excavation, plumbing, concrete, crane, electrical, general. The price does not cover anything not listed in this quote.

lineItems.description: Excavation of spa pit and trenches, spoil removal
lineItems.notes: Includes machine hire and tip fees

lineItems.description: Sub-surface drainage and aggregate around shell

lineItems.prefillNote: Sized from survey: spa 2.3m x 2.3m plus 300mm each side = 8.4 m2

lineItems.description: Crane hire for spa placement into pit
lineItems.prefillNote: Survey says crane/machinery access is needed

lineItems.description: Water supply and drainage runs, trenched
lineItems.prefillNote: Distance to water/drainage from survey: 6 m

lineItems.description: Plumbing rough-in, connection and pressure test
Electrical cable run from switchboard, trenched
lineItems.prefillNote: Cable run from survey: 18 m (32 A supply)

lineItems.description: Dedicated circuit, isolator, equipotential bonding, connect and test
lineItems.notes: Licensed electrician, certificate of compliance supplied

lineItems.description: Backfill, compact and rough level around shell
Tight access allowance - manual handling / smaller machine
lineItems.prefillNote: Access is 1.05 m wide (under 1.1 m) - manual handling applies

lineItems.description: Fill, commission, water balance and handover walkthrough

paymentTerms: 10% deposit on acceptance. 40% before work starts on site. 40% when the spa is placed. Final 10% on handover. Payment by bank transfer within 3 days of each invoice.
